posts.text:
Today on the show: 

-Joe Kent resigns! Zionists tempt fate attacking him. 
-Erika Kirk loses a TPUSA chapter in Arkansas. They call out the manipulation and lies. 
-Is Bibi Dead though? We investigate. 

Join us LIVE: 

piped.video/live/I0OaY6Gryqk

Pleased to announce we are the #1 Podcast globally again!
(tied w/ Joe Rogan but he doesn’t count, he’s always crushing it). 
Thank you to everyone worldwide who listens and fights with us. My team of 5 works really hard and we are beyond grateful.🙏

There is a pound of make-up on his face and he’s shooting SNL skits with Mike Huckabee while missing serious meetings. 
Everything is wrong. You don’t need to produce skits to prove you’re alive. You just have to go on living.


Alexander Dugin (@AGDugin)

Netanyahu appearances still look very strange somehow.



— https://nitter.net/AGDugin/status/2033960574132900134#m

Joe Kent is an American hero, patriot and veteran. 
Trump is a shameful President. 
May American troops take his lead and look into conscientious objection to Bibi’s Red Heifer War. 
Goyim stand down.


Joe Kent (@joekent16jan19)

After much reflection, I have decided to resign from my position as Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, effective today.

I cannot in good conscience support the ongoing war in Iran. Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we sta

I agree. These weird, hyper-produced videos do not make any sense, especially in the context of him skipping all of his commitments.


Alon Mizrahi (@alon_mizrahi)

Ok, something happened to Netanyahu 100%



— https://nitter.net/alon_mizrahi/status/2033686576396701854#m

I realize people are not taking me seriously enough when I say that I am not the same person after Charlie’s death. I will not suffer fools, I will not suffer liars, and I will not suffer dishonorable strippers. Attached please find the once-confidential agreement between me and Kim Klacik, before she violated that agreement by lying about our court case.
I would like to draw your attention specifically to contract term 3— clause which prevented me from ordering a transcript of the deposition wh

This is objectively hilarious. 
😂😂😂


✦✦✦ 𝙿𝚊𝚖𝚙𝚑𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚜 ✦✦✦ (@PamphletsY)

🚨🇮🇷 BREAKING — Iran FM Araghchi:

"Hormuz is Only Closed for Zionists."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/PamphletsY/status/2033609776006107217#m

Follow @candaceoshow for show clips!


CANDACE (@candaceoshow)

The Bidding War for Charlie Kirk’s Legacy.

#StorageWars





— https://nitter.net/candaceoshow/status/2033690360581349838#m

Today on the show: 

-Trump betrays Tucker Carlson like he betrayed the wishes of Charlie Kirk. He doesn’t deserve any support outside of Israel. 
-We are losing in Iran. 
-Megan McCain is a piece of shit. 

piped.video/live/k8ueJdPFel4

Correct. Erika would have enough legal sense to know that if she boo-hoo cried and asked us to end a deposition, and then we subsequently signed an agreement for confidentiality to hide her boo-hoo breakdown from the public, it would be a bad idea for her to then violate the confidentiality which really only benefited her! 

You see the beauty of being me is I love allowing the public in. I have nothing to hide and I intended to honor keeping mum about the emotional breakdown you had. 

But we a

No, Kimberly. What actually happened was you broke down crying during the deposition once my lawyer asked you a direct question about a drug dealer. You didn’t expect us to have the drug dealer’s name and number after we asked you about cocaine usage but we had both, because my source was another stripper. 
You then cried, and apologized to my face, and moved to dismissed mid-deposition. And in case you woke up wanting to try me this morning, you should know there’s a remaining transcript and vi

Jordan Peterson once said “you cannot twist the fabric of reality without it snapping back”. Though his words were not shared in the context of today’s current events, they ought to be recalled as we examine the objective failure of this administration’s disastrous decision to attack Iran.

Over the last three years especially, we have watched Zionists bend the fabric of reality; They have purchased views, influencers and journalists. They have activated millions of online bots. They even went s

If they come for Tucker, we ride at dawn. 
Really nothing else to say here. 

We’re not doing the gulags 2.0 with these Bolshevik descendants.


Tucker Carlson (@TuckerCarlson)

When you discover the CIA has been reading your texts in order to frame you for a crime.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/TuckerCarlson/status/2032954928977818069#m

This is the largest and most expensive U.S Embassy in the world. The size of Vatican City. 
Now abandoned because Trump launched a war on Zionist vibes.


DD Geopolitics (@DD_Geopolitics)

🇺🇸🇮🇶 A suicide drone has struck the U.S. Embassy compound in Baghdad, targeting a Marine Corps sniper position and a surveillance radar. Smoke columns are rising from the heart of the compound.

This is the most fortified American diplomatic facility in the country, inside the Green Zone.

Video
  



Video

Somehow this isn’t making a splash in the American news cycle.
The White House too busy preparing a Mortal Kombat war meme?
Maybe their dumb asses should have gone to Congress? Or listened to Charlie Kirk rather than crackhead Zionists and their messianic red heifers?


Sky News (@SkyNews)

BREAKING: The U.S. embassy in Baghdad has told American citizens in Iraq to leave immediately.

Sky's @JonathanSamuels reports ⬇️

Iran war latest 🔗 trib.al/xxZ3UaI

📺 Sky 501, Virgin 602, Freeview 233 and Yo

There is a cover up afoot regarding the health of Bibi Netanyahu. 

The United States government should be addressing this head on but there is a directive to stay mum. 

What’s going on? Haven’t they lied enough?
